name: omarchy_filling_out_pdfs
content:
Fiing out PDFs 
Omarchy ships with a nice, basic PDF viewer caed Document Viewer. This is the program
that' open any PDFs you just doube cick on.
But you can ony use Document Viewer to fi out PDFs that have been setup as forms. If
you need to fi out PDFs that haven't, or you need to sign a PDF, you' have to right-cick
the fie, seect Open With..., and pick Xourna++.
Xourna++ wi et you write anywhere on a PDF using the T too. If you need to sign a
document, you' need an image of your signature, and you can use the Image too to
insert this signature and resize it.
When you're done fiing out the PDF, use Fie > Export as PDF to save the fina version.
Filling out PDFs · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/54/filling-out-pdfs
